Wantonness is acting solely on instincts, and ignoring your rationality. It is a complimentary plague to [[Analysis paralysis]] and it causes serious issues for people. Both are parts of the [[Reflectiveness Gap]].<ref>https://evolution.faith/sevenfold-vaccine/</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Wantonness]]
[[Category:Drowning]]
[[Category:Foolishness]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
